report.summary: Full 6-agent cycle completed since v8. Build v10 scaffolded 2 new learn guides (Optimism Superchain, Yield Aggregators). Community v9 drafted tweets #535-539 + newsletter v60. Design v7 polished new pages with 2 OG images. Publish v6 promoted 5 tool pages. EOD v3 logged 137 uncommitted files (+6) and 711 published slugs (+7). BTC ~$66,911 (flat). F&G 29 (Fear). Production still frozen at e3f63fc — 41st escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA v8 → v9: Full 6-agent rotation completed. Build, community, design, publish, and eod all ran since last standup.
BUILD v10: Researched + scaffolded 2 new learn guides — Optimism Superchain & OP Stack Ecosystem, Crypto Yield Aggregators & DeFi Vaults. Fills key L2 and DeFi yield content gaps.

COMMUNITY v9: Drafted 5 tweets (#535-539), newsletter v60 'The Recovery Signal', Discord announcement, 2 social card SVGs. Covered F&G 8→29 recovery, CLARITY Act Senate markup, Glamsterdam testnet, 6 new learn guides, stablecoin dry powder narrative.
DESIGN v7: Audited 2 new pages from build v10, fixed 10 UX issues (responsive typography, semantic nav), created 2 OG images (1200x630), added accessibility styles.
PUBLISH v6: Promoted 5 tool pages (Cycle 7) to PUBLISHED_PAGES. QA passed. Deploy still pending — repo mid-rebase, git push blocked.
EOD v3: 137 uncommitted files (+6 since v8). 711 published slugs (+7). 1 of 4 tool pages promoted. All 6 API routes structurally present, 0/6 rate-limited. Deploy debt is sole P0.

MARKET: BTC ~$66,911 (+0.03% from v8). F&G 29 (Fear, unchanged). Market cap ~$2.38T. Recovery from extreme fear (index 8 on Apr 2) continues but remains fragile. NFP report expected today — key macro catalyst.
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel Analytics. Market data confirmed via web search.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE OUTPUT: All 6 agents ran a full rotation since v8. Build scaffolded 2 pages, community drafted 5 tweets + newsletter, design polished + created OG images, publish promoted 5 tool pages, eod ran QA audit.
TODAY'S TOTAL: 39 agent runs. standup×9, build×7, community×8, design×6, eod×7, publish×2. $3,495 human-equivalent cost.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (41st ESCALATION): Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2. Now 137 uncommitted files (+6 since v8). 711 published slugs in registry but deploy blocked. Every cycle adds more staging debt. NFP catalyst today could spike search traffic — frozen site can't capture it. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — QUEUE REFILL: Publish queue still near-empty (2 entries needing page.tsx). Build v10 added 2 more guides but they need to flow through publish pipeline. Scaffold monad-guide + zora, then batch-refill 50 pages from ~638 orphan inventory.
P2 — SEO BUG: jupiter-dex-aggregator 'use client' + metadata export conflict persists (1 issue).
P3 — TECHNICAL DEBT: 111 phantom published slugs (missing page.tsx → 404s). 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking). 0/6 API routes rate-limited. defi-yields route still needs fallback data.
P4 — CARRY-OVER: mev-guide, solana-vs-ethereum warn status. 4 tool pages (token-radar, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, market-recap) — some may now be promoted per publish v6.
BLOCKERS: Deploy authorization remains sole blocker. All other work continues to accumulate in staging.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, 41st ESCALATION): 137 uncommitted files. 711 slugs registered but prod frozen at 2-day-old commit. NFP report dropping today — macro catalyst. BTC hovering at $67K support. Both scenarios (bounce or breakdown) drive crypto search volume. Deploy is $0 action with maximum compounding ROI. Every hour frozen = more staging debt, more risk of merge conflicts, more missed traffic.

PRIORITY 2 — SCAFFOLD + QUEUE REFILL: Queue near-empty. Build v10 added 2 guides (Optimism Superchain, Yield Aggregators) but queue pipeline needs feeding. Scaffold monad-guide + zora page.tsx to unblock 2 items, then batch-refill 50 from orphan pool. Prioritize: DeFi safety guides (capitalize on fear sentiment), staking content ($316B stablecoin supply = yield-seeking capital), L2 ecosystem (Optimism content just built).

PRIORITY 3 — TOOL PAGE PROMOTION + OG COVERAGE: Publish v6 promoted 5 tool pages but 104+ learn pages still missing OG images. Design v7 created 2 OG images but coverage gap remains large. Each OG image improves social sharing CTR. Batch-generate OG images for highest-traffic learn pages first.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $3,495 (39 runs: standup×9=$405, build×7=$1,631, community×8=$328, design×6=$360, eod×7=$441, publish×2=$110, misc=$220)
